phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è l'ingresso del Palazzo, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH ling-GRES-so del pa-LAT-soh, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si trovano i biglietti, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see TROH-vah-noh ee bee-LYET-tee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket office, ahead on the right.

responses.english: At the ticket office, ahead on the right.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, a che ora chiude oggi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, ah keh OH-rah KYOO-deh OJ-jee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, bisogna prenotare la visita, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, bee-SOH-nyah preh-noh-TAH-reh lah VEE-zee-tah, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è la Cappella Palatina, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH lah kap-PEL-lah pah-lah-TEE-nah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Al primo piano, seguire le indicazioni.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL PREE-moh pee-AH-noh seh-goo-EE-reh LEH een-dee-kah-tsee-OH-nee
likely_response.translation_en: On the first floor, follow the signs.

responses.english: On the first floor, follow the signs.
responses.phonetic: AHL PREE-moh pee-AH-noh seh-goo-EE-reh LEH een-dee-kah-tsee-OH-nee
responses.french: Al primo piano, seguire le indicazioni.
